title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking is accepted and then revoked [Android]
scenario: Find My Device prompts for location permission again after permission is revoked via Android Settings on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Accept the license agreement on the Home screen.
4. Connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device.
5. Go to Android Settings → Apps → Poly Lens → Permissions and revoke the Location permission.
6. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Navigate to the Find My Device feature (Home screen → [Device Name] → Find My Device).
8. Observe the app behavior when accessing Find My Device.
expected: The app should detect that the Location permission has been revoked and prompt the user to grant the Location permission again before allowing access to the Find My Device feature.
